batch.computeenvironment.updatepolicy.Cf: Specifies the infrastructure update policy for the compute environment. For more information about infrastructure updates, see [Updating compute environments](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/batch/latest/userguide/updating-compute-environments.html) in the * AWS Batch User Guide*.

batch.computeenvironment.updatepolicy.Jo.Description: Specifies the job timeout (in minutes) when the compute environment infrastructure is updated. The default value is 30.

batch.computeenvironment.updatepolicy.Te.Description: Specifies whether jobs are automatically terminated when the computer environment infrastructure is updated. The default value is `false`.
